name: Tomatensalat (Tomato Salad)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the tomatoes and place them in a bowl.
2. Add the freshly ground pepper, sugar, vegetable oil, vinegar, salt, dried basil, thyme, and diced onion to the bowl with the chopped tomatoes.
3. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
4. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for 1 hour before serving.
5. Serve on lettuce leaves.
